title: Automate and Verify Marketing Reports Accurately
description:
Did you know that poor data quality costs organizations an average of $15 million annually? This Short Course was created to help digital marketing professionals accomplish reliable, automated reporting that stakeholders can trust for critical business decisions.

By completing this course, you'll be able to configure automated workflows that keep your marketing dashboards current without manual intervention, and systematically validate report accuracy against source data to catch discrepancies before they impact decision-making. These skills will immediately enhance your value as a marketing analyst and ensure your reports become the trusted foundation for strategic planning.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:

Apply automated workflows to update and maintain marketing dashboards.
Evaluate the accuracy of reports by validating metrics against source data and documenting discrepancies.

This course is unique because it combines technical automation skills with rigorous data validation methodologies, ensuring you not only create efficient reporting processes but also maintain the data integrity that executive teams depend on.

To be successful in this course, you should have basic experience with marketing analytics platforms and spreadsheet applications.
